calendar.matters:
Petition For Order To Determine Title In Trust And Transfer Title Of Property To Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-21-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bruce Thompson (via court call) for David Soyster.

The Court asked if there was anything further to report and asked about the issue regarding venue. Mr. Thompson stated that there is nothing new to report and that the issue of venue was discussed extensively in the response dated August 3, 2015. The Court took the petition for order to determine title in trust and transfer title of property to trustee under submission.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
